---
title: "Week 10"
date: 10-28-24
description: |
  We will continue learning about statistical intervals.
editor: source
draft: false
---

| Lecture   | Slides                       | Annotated  | Video     |
|-----------|------------------------------|------------|-----------|
| Tuesday    | [Slides](../lectures/10a.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/10a_annotated.pdf) | [Video]() |
| Thursday | [Slides](../lectures/10b.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/10b_annotated.pdf) | [Video]() |
